name: WF1 — PharmaOS Multi-Source Signal Ingestion Engine

nodes.name: ⏰ Cron Trigger (6h)
nodes.notes: Fires every 6 hours. Also accepts manual trigger for testing.

nodes.name: 🔧 Init Run Context
nodes.notes: Initializes run context with run_id, drug watchlist, counters, and lookback window.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pharmaos_ingestion_runs (run_id, domain, source, pipeline_version, started_at)
VALUES ($1, 'multi', 'wf1_all', $2, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (run_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

nodes.name: 📝 Log Run Start
nodes.notes: Creates the ingestion run record. Updated at end with final counts.

nodes.name: 🔀 Fan Out Sources
nodes.notes: Pass-through node to fan out into parallel source branches.

nodes.name: 🔌 CB Check: fda_faers
nodes.notes: Check circuit breaker before calling FDA FAERS API.

nodes.name: 🌐 FDA FAERS API
nodes.notes: Fetches serious adverse events from past 7 days. Rate-limited: 240 req/min with key.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Transform FAERS
nodes.notes: Transforms FAERS events into signals_mesh rows with impact scoring, watchlist check, dedup.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pharmaos_dead_letter_queue 
(source_workflow, source_node, failed_payload, error_message, status, next_retry_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.source_workflow }}', '{{ $json.source_node }}', 
'{{ $json.failed_payload }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.error_message }}', 
'PENDING', NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes');

nodes.name: 🌐 FDA Recalls API
nodes.notes: Fetches drug enforcement/recall reports from the past 7 days.

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { source: 'fda_recalls', fetched: items.length, new: items.filter(i => i.json.is_new === true).length, updated: items.filter(i => i.json.is_new === false).length, deduped: items.filter(i => i.json.is_new === false).length, errors: 0 }}];

nodes.name: 🌐 ClinicalTrials.gov API
nodes.notes: Fetches recently updated cancer/oncology trials from ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API.

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { source: 'clinicaltrials_gov', fetched: items.length, new: items.filter(i => i.json.is_new === true).length, updated: items.filter(i => i.json.is_new === false).length, deduped: items.filter(i => i.json.is_new === false).length, errors: 0 }}];

nodes.name: 🌐 PubMed ESearch
nodes.notes: Searches PubMed for recent oncology publications.

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();
return [{ json: { source: 'pubmed', fetched: items.length, new: items.filter(i => i.json.is_new === true).length, updated: items.filter(i => i.json.is_new === false).length, deduped: 0, errors: 0 }}];

nodes.name: 🔗 Merge All Counts
nodes.notes: Merges result counts from all 4 source branches (expand to 6 with DailyMed + Labels).

nodes.name: 🔄 Refresh Views
nodes.notes: Refreshes mv_signal_dashboard and mv_asset_signal_summary concurrently.

nodes.name: 💬 Slack Run Summary
nodes.notes: Posts WF1 run summary to Slack #pharmaos-signals channel.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pharmaos_audit_log (event_type, domain, actor, action, metadata, pipeline_version)
VALUES ('INGESTION_COMPLETE', 'multi', 'WF1_Ingestion', 
'Ingestion run {{ $json.run_id }} completed. {{ $json.status }}',
'{"run_id": "{{ $json.run_id }}", "fetched": {{ $json.total_fetched }}, "new": {{ $json.total_new }}, "errors": {{ $json.total_errors }}}'::jsonb,
2);

nodes.name: 🔌 CB Check: fda_labels
nodes.notes: Check circuit breaker before calling openFDA Drug Label API.

nodes.name: 🌐 FDA Labels API
nodes.notes: Fetches recently updated labels focusing on safety sections (warnings, boxed_warning).

nodes.name: ⚙️ Transform FDA Labels
nodes.notes: Transforms openFDA label docs into regulatory label_update signals with safety-focused scoring.

nodes.name: 📊 Count FDA Labels Results
nodes.notes: Aggregates result counts for FDA Labels branch.

nodes.name: ❌ CB Fail: fda_labels
nodes.notes: Records circuit breaker failure when labels branch blocked.

nodes.name: 🔌 CB Check: dailymed
nodes.notes: Check circuit breaker before calling DailyMed SPLs API.

nodes.name: 🌐 DailyMed SPLs API
nodes.notes: Fetches recently published SPLs from DailyMed (page 1, pagesize 50).

nodes.name: ⚙️ Transform DailyMed
nodes.notes: Transforms DailyMed SPL metadata into label_update signals.

nodes.name: 📊 Count DailyMed Results
nodes.notes: Aggregates result counts for DailyMed branch.

nodes.name: ❌ CB Fail: dailymed
nodes.notes: Records circuit breaker failure when DailyMed branch blocked.

nodes.name: PubMed EFetch
nodes.notes: Fetches full abstracts for the PubMed IDs found in ESearch.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id          AS asset_id,
  name,
  indication,
  therapeutic_area,
  strategic_priority,
  status,
  last_signal_at,
  'pharmaos_assets' AS _source_type
FROM pharmaos_assets
WHERE
  status NOT IN ('DISCONTINUED', 'WITHDRAWN')
  AND (
    strategic_priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
    OR last_signal_at IS NULL
    OR last_signal_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  )
LIMIT 50;

INSERT INTO signals_mesh (
  signal_domain, signal_type, source_id, source,
  title, summary, entity_name, drug_name, indication,
  sponsor, geography, url, raw_text,
  impact_level, impact_score, route_tier, notif_priority,
  competitor_flag, is_urgent, confidence,
  fingerprint, dedup_hash, quality_score, score_breakdown,
  first_seen_at, last_seen_at, ingested_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.signal_domain || "ci" }}',
  '{{ $json.signal_type || "publication" }}',
  '{{ $json.source_id }}',
  '{{ $json.source || "pubmed" }}',

  '{{ ($json.title || "").slice(0,512).replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.summary || "").slice(0,4000).replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.entity_name || "").slice(0,255).replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.drug_name || "").slice(0,255).replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.indication || "").slice(0,500).replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.sponsor || "").slice(0,255).replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.geography || "").slice(0,100).replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.url || "").slice(0,1024).replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.raw_text || "").slice(0,8000).replace(/'/g,"''") }}',

  CASE
    WHEN {{ Number($json.impact_score ?? 0) }} >= 6 THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN {{ Number($json.impact_score ?? 0) }} >= 3 THEN 'MED'
    ELSE 'LOW'
  END,
  {{ Number($json.impact_score ?? 0) }},

  '{{ $json.route_tier || "pubmed" }}',
  '{{ $json.notif_priority || "P5" }}',
  {{ $json.competitor_flag ? 'true' : 'false' }},
  {{ $json.is_urgent ? 'true' : 'false' }},
  '{{ ($json.confidence || "low").replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  {{ $json.fingerprint ? "'" + $json.fingerprint.slice(0,255).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.dedup_hash ? "'" + $json.dedup_hash.slice(0,255).replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number($json.quality_score ?? 0) }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.score_breakdown || {}) }}'::jsonb,

  NOW(), NOW(), NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (signal_domain, source_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  last_seen_at    = NOW(),
  impact_level    = EXCLUDED.impact_level,
  impact_score    = EXCLUDED.impact_score,
  summary         = EXCLUDED.summary,
  route_tier      = EXCLUDED.route_tier,
  notif_priority  = EXCLUDED.notif_priority,
  score_breakdown = EXCLUDED.score_breakdown,
  quality_score   = EXCLUDED.quality_score;

nodes.name: 🔌 CB Check: bioRxiv API
nodes.notes: Check circuit breaker before calling DailyMed SPLs API.

nodes.name: 📊 Count BioRxiv Results
nodes.notes: Aggregates result counts for DailyMed branch.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  asset_id,
  drug_name,
  signal_domain,
  signal_type,
  source,
  impact_level,
  impact_score,
  competitor_flag,
  is_urgent,
  score_breakdown,
  route_tier,
  first_seen_at,
  last_seen_at,
  ingested_at,
  indication,
  sponsor,
  title
FROM signals_mesh
WHERE last_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';

UPDATE pharmaos_ingestion_runs
SET
  signals_fetched = {{ $json.signals_fetched ?? 0 }},
  signals_new = {{ $json.signals_new ?? 0 }},
  signals_updated = {{ $json.signals_updated ?? 0 }},
  signals_deduped = {{ $json.signals_deduped ?? 0 }},
  errors = {{ $json.errors ?? 0 }},
  error_details = '{{ $json.error_details || "{}" }}'::jsonb,
  api_latency_ms = '{{ $json.api_latency_ms || "{}" }}'::jsonb,
  finished_at = NOW()
WHERE run_id = '{{ $json.run_id }}'
RETURNING *;

UPDATE signals_mesh
SET
  -- ── TEXT fields ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  source_id               = '{{ $json.source_id }}'::text,
  signal_domain           = '{{ $json.signal_domain }}'::text,
  signal_type             = '{{ $json.signal_type }}'::text,
  source                  = '{{ $json.source }}'::text,
  title                   = $title${{ $json.title }}$title$::text,
  summary                 = $summary${{ $json.summary }}$summary$::text,
  raw_text                = $raw_text${{ $json.raw_text }}$raw_text$::text,
  entity_name             = '{{ $json.entity_name }}'::text,
  geography               = '{{ $json.geography }}'::text,
  drug_name               = '{{ $json.drug_name }}'::text,
  sponsor                 = $sponsor${{ $json.sponsor }}$sponsor$::text,
  url                     = '{{ $json.url }}'::text,
  impact_level            = '{{ $json.impact_level }}'::text,
  route_tier              = '{{ $json.route_tier }}'::text,
  notif_priority          = '{{ $json.notif_priority }}'::text,
  confidence              = '{{ $json.confidence }}'::text,
  qualitydecision         = '{{ $json.qualitydecision }}'::text,
  assetmatchmethod        = '{{ $json.assetmatchmethod }}'::text,
  matchmethod             = '{{ $json.matchmethod }}'::text,
  duplicaterisk           = '{{ $json.duplicaterisk }}'::text,
  safety_severity         = '{{ $json.safety_severity }}'::text,
  patient_impact_estimate = '{{ $json.patient_impact_estimate }}'::text,
  fingerprint             = '{{ $json.fingerprint }}'::text,
  deduphash               = '{{ $json.deduphash }}'::text,
  pipelineversion         = '{{ $json.pipelineversion }}'::text,
  merge_status            = '{{ $json.merge_status }}'::text,

  -- ── NULLABLE TEXT fields ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  asset_id                = {{ $json.asset_id        === null ? 'NULL' : "$asset_id$"        + $json.asset_id        + "$asset_id$::text" }},
  indication              = {{ $json.indication      === null ? 'NULL' : "$indication$"      + $json.indication      + "$indication$::text" }},
  phase                   = {{ $json.phase           === null ? 'NULL' : "$phase$"           + $json.phase           + "$phase$::text" }},
  status                  = {{ $json.status          === null ? 'NULL' : "$status$"          + $json.status          + "$status$::text" }},
  moa                     = {{ $json.moa             === null ? 'NULL' : "$moa$"             + $json.moa             + "$moa$::text" }},
  modality                = {{ $json.modality        === null ? 'NULL' : "$modality$"        + $json.modality        + "$modality$::text" }},
  nct_id                  = {{ $json.nct_id          === null ? 'NULL' : "$nct_id$"          + $json.nct_id          + "$nct_id$::text" }},
  ai_summary              = {{ $json.ai_summary      === null ? 'NULL' : "$ai_summary$"      + $json.ai_summary      + "$ai_summary$::text" }},
  recommended_action      = {{ $json.recommended_action === null ? 'NULL' : "$recommended_action$" + $json.recommended_action + "$recommended_action$::text" }},
  contextquality          = {{ $json.contextquality  === null ? 'NULL' : "$contextquality$"  + $json.contextquality  + "$contextquality$::text" }},
  modelused               = {{ $json.modelused       === null ? 'NULL' : "$modelused$"       + $json.modelused       + "$modelused$::text" }},
  modelroutingreason      = {{ $json.modelroutingreason === null ? 'NULL' : "$modelroutingreason$" + $json.modelroutingreason + "$modelroutingreason$::text" }},
  override_status         = {{ $json.override_status === null ? 'NULL' : "$override_status$" + $json.override_status + "$override_status$::text" }},
  override_by             = {{ $json.override_by     === null ? 'NULL' : "$override_by$"     + $json.override_by     + "$override_by$::text" }},
  override_reason         = {{ $json.override_reason === null ? 'NULL' : "$override_reason$" + $json.override_reason + "$override_reason$::text" }},
  refusal                 = {{ $json.refusal         === null ? 'NULL' : "$refusal$"         + $json.refusal         + "$refusal$::text" }},

  -- ── TEXT[] (Postgres array) fields ────────────────────────────────────────
  alert_channels          = ARRAY[{{ $json.alert_channels.map(v => `'${v}'`).join(', ') || '' }}]::text[],

  -- ── JSONB fields ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  qualityflags            = $qualityflags${{ JSON.stringify($json.qualityflags) }}$qualityflags$::jsonb,
  ai_classification       = $ai_cls${{ JSON.stringify($json.ai_classification) }}$ai_cls$::jsonb,
  score_breakdown         = $score_bd${{ JSON.stringify($json.score_breakdown) }}$score_bd$::jsonb,
  triagehints             = $triagehints${{ JSON.stringify($json.triagehints) }}$triagehints$::jsonb,
  _triage_meta            = $triage_meta${{ JSON.stringify($json._triage_meta) }}$triage_meta$::jsonb,

  -- ── BOOLEAN fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ai_processed            = {{ $json.ai_processed }}::boolean,
  competitor_flag         = {{ $json.competitor_flag }}::boolean,
  is_urgent               = {{ $json.is_urgent }}::boolean,
  strategymemoryused      = {{ $json.strategymemoryused }}::boolean,

  -- ── INTEGER fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  impact_score            = {{ $json.impact_score }}::integer,
  priority_score          = {{ $json.priority_score }}::integer,
  quality_score           = {{ $json.quality_score }}::integer,
  scoring_version         = {{ $json.scoring_version }}::integer,
  version                 = {{ $json.version }}::integer,
  prompttokens            = {{ $json.prompttokens }}::integer,
  completiontokens        = {{ $json.completiontokens }}::integer,
  totaltokens             = {{ $json.totaltokens }}::integer,

  -- ── NUMERIC fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  temperatureused         = {{ $json.temperatureused }}::numeric,

  -- ── TIMESTAMPTZ fields ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  first_seen_at           = '{{ $json.first_seen_at }}'::timestamptz,
  last_seen_at            = '{{ $json.last_seen_at }}'::timestamptz,
  ingested_at             = '{{ $json.ingested_at }}'::timestamptz,
  mergeat                 = '{{ $json.mergeat }}'::timestamptz

WHERE
  id = {{ $json.id }}::integer
